items.headline: Accenture downgraded by Morgan Stanley as AI spending crowds out IT service demand
items.summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley downgraded Accenture to Equal-weight from Overweight and slashed its price target to $177 from $240, arguing that the anticipated boost to IT services spending from artificial intelligence investments has yet to materialize as enterprises continue to prioritize AI projects over traditional discretionary technology spending.

items.headline: Automatic Data Processing And 2 Other Reliable Dividend Stocks To Consider
items.summary: In the last week, the United States market has stayed flat, but it is up 24% over the past year with earnings forecast to grow by 19% annually. In such a dynamic environment, reliable dividend stocks like Automatic Data Processing and others can offer stability and consistent income for investors seeking dependable returns.

items.headline: Accenture (ACN) Stock After 44% Slide Are Cash Flows Pointing To A Rebound?
items.summary: Are you wondering whether Accenture's recent weakness has left the stock mispriced, or if the current level fairly reflects the risks you care about? After falling 44.4% over the past year and 34.5% year to date, while moving only 0.9% over the last 30 days and declining 2.4% in the past week, the current US$170.28 share price has many investors reassessing what they are really paying for.
